description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a flat, slightly sloped roof and large glass sliding doors opening onto a spacious patio. The front area is dominated by a rectangular swimming pool, surrounded by a paved terrace with outdoor furniture, including lounge chairs and a dining set. Lush green lawns and palm trees are positioned at the corners, enclosed by a low fence, adding a tropical touch. The rear facade is more minimal, with fewer windows and a simple, clean wall. The side views reveal additional windows and access points, as well as landscaped garden areas with seating. The overall design emphasizes open, airy living spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass doors, a front swimming pool, and landscaped gardens with palm trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the swimming pool, patio with dining and lounge furniture, large glass doors, and palm trees at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, side garden with seating, and the pool extending along the length of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, minimal windows, and a simple, clean facade with green strips on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional garden seating, the pool, and the continuation of the flat roof and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large sliding glass doors and grouped side windows
